details.reasoning: Excellent implementation that fully satisfies all rubric requirements. The agent successfully created: (1) a properly structured package with correct dependencies (@prisma/dmmf, @prisma/generator, @prisma/generator-helper); (2) an entry point (bin.ts) using generatorHandler with both onManifest and onGenerate callbacks; (3) a generator that reads DMMF and iterates over models and enums; (4) TypeScript interfaces for each model plus all required CRUD input types (WhereInput, WhereUniqueInput, CreateInput, UpdateInput, OrderByInput); (5) a model client class with all five CRUD methods (findMany, findUnique, create, update, delete) using correct HTTP verbs (GET, POST, PATCH, DELETE) with proper type signatures; (6) output written to the generator output directory via fs.writeFile; (7) clean TypeScript code following Prisma generator patterns. Additional strengths: comprehensive test coverage with fixtures and integration tests, proper field type mapping (scalars, enums, relations, lists, nullability), correct handling of read-only and ID fields, root client generation, custom fetcher injection pattern, CI/CD integration, and clean code organization. Minor observation: implementation is production-quality and nearly flawless.
